name: House of Yes
notes: Immersive queer performance + dance venue. Themed nights, dress codes, consent-forward.

name: 3 Dollar Bill
notes: Large queer venue — indoor club + outdoor yard. Hub for Pride-weekend parties.

name: Nowadays
notes: Outdoor garden + indoor club on the Brooklyn/Queens line. Daytime and marathon parties.

name: Basement
notes: Serious techno room beneath Nowadays-adjacent Knockdown Center area. Strict no-phones.

name: Sultan Room
notes: Intimate venue + rooftop (Turk's Inn). Eclectic bookings.

name: Pure Honey
notes: Queer party at House of Yes.

name: Mister Sunday: Soul Summit
notes: Daytime outdoor dance party at Nowadays (Mister Sunday / Soul Summit — same daytime party in this plan).

name: Black Market Marathon
notes: Pride-weekend marathon party at 3 Dollar Bill (3DB).
